headings.usage: H1/H2 for massive, architectural section titles.

body.usage: Paragraphs and standard text for clean legibility.

mono_labels.usage: Overlines, statistics (40% throughput), and technical data.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Industrial minimalism. Dense data clusters contrasted with massive negative space. Avoid generic centered layouts.
layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Strict grid-cols-12 architecture with sharp 1px borders exposing the grid structure.
layout_spacing.radius: rounded-none (Sharp corners to reinforce the technical/architectural feel)

motion_3d.library: React Three Fiber + Drei, Framer Motion
motion_3d.hero_scene: Floating abstract geometric nodes representing a microservices architecture (Azure/C# ecosystem). Nodes rotate slowly, casting soft shadows, and emit a subtle #FF3B30 glow upon mouse interaction. The canvas must sit behind the primary typography with a dark overlay (bg-black/40) ensuring text contrast.
motion_3d.skills_scene: Interactive 3D constellation. Tech stack icons mapped to a spherical point cloud that reacts to mouse movement. Uses standard Drei <OrbitControls> limited to horizontal rotation.
motion_3d.animations: Framer Motion for scroll-driven reveals. Use smooth, non-bouncy easing (e.g., ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]). Subtle opacity fades and y-axis translation.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (#121212) with 1px solid border (white/10). No box-shadows. Hover state: border transitions to white/40.
components.buttons: Sharp edges. Primary: Solid #FFFFFF background, #000000 text. Hover: #FF3B30 background, #FFFFFF text. Include data-testid.
components.forms: Pure black inputs with 1px white/20 borders. Focus state must use a sharp 1px #FF3B30 ring.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (Duotone) for a high-end technical feel.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Fullscreen 3D canvas background. Left-aligned typography. H1: 'DEEPAK BANSAL / SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER'. Included bento grid for stats (40% throughput, 99.9% uptime, 10,000+ users, 25% tech debt reduction) overlaying the 3D scene.

sections.name: About & Skills
sections.description: Split 12-column layout. Left (col-span-5): High-contrast portrait + Developer Narrative. Right (col-span-7): The 3D Skills Constellation Canvas.

sections.name: Featured Projects
sections.description: Grid-based gallery with massive imagery. Projects: DiagramAI, budget-planner, CarDamageEstimatorV2, DevPortfolio. Hovering over a project card reveals its tech stack and a 'View on GitHub' button.

sections.name: Experience & Awards
sections.description: Architectural timeline mapping Coforge SSE & SE roles. 1px white borders connecting nodes. Awards integrated into the timeline.

sections.name: Contact
sections.description: Footer-level section. Left: Massive 'LET'S BUILD.' text. Right: Monospaced form for contact (stored in MongoDB). Include email (deepak23bansal1997@gmail.com) and GitHub links.

profile_photo.description: Black and white studio portrait representing the professional

project_placeholder_2.description: Orange/Red network graph fitting the Vermilion accent

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Build using React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and React Three Fiber. 2. Use .js extensions. 3. Implement the strict Dark Swiss architecture (sharp corners, 1px borders, pure white/black contrast with Vermilion #FF3B30 accents). 4. Ensure the 3D canvases do not break page scrolling (use pointer-events wisely). 5. Attach data-testid to all interactive components. 6. Build custom structural components using raw HTML/Tailwind; avoid importing full Shadcn components where they force generic styling, instead adapt them to the brutalist look.
